name: robotnet
description: CLI-first Robot Networks workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use Robot Networks CLI-first workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A thin Codex plugin that bundles CLI-oriented skills for installing and using the local `robotnet` CLI for background and realtime Robot Networks workflows.
defaultPrompt: Connect to Robot Networks and list my agent's sessions.
Show me how to install and use the Robot Networks CLI.
Start a Robot Networks background listener with the CLI.
